title: Backup and Recovery Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on database backup strategies and recovery operations.

questions.question: Which type of backup copies all changes made since the last *full* backup?
options: Full Backup
Incremental Backup
Differential Backup
Point-in-Time Backup

questions.question: What is PITR (Point-in-Time Recovery)?
options: Restoring a database as fast as possible
Restoring a database starting from a full backup and applying transactions up to a specific second
A backup that only includes personal information
A recovery that happens in a different time zone

questions.question: What does RPO (Recovery Point Objective) measure?
options: The speed of the restoration process
The amount of data loss in terms of time
The time it takes to get the server back online
The number of points a user has in a quiz

questions.question: Which backup method is usually slower but more flexible across different database versions?
options: Physical Backup
Logical Backup (SQL Dump)
Hardware Snapshots
Replication

questions.question: Which of these is a critical best practice for backups?
options: Store backups on the same physical disk as the database
Never test the restoration process to save time
Store backups in an offsite location
Only perform backups when the database is empty
